name: Almond Joy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and condensed milk in a double boiler until smooth.
2. Stir in the vanilla extract and salt.
3. Mix in the coconut until evenly coated.
4. Drop spoonfuls onto a lined cookie sheet.
5. Press a whole almond on top of each cookie.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes, checking at 8 minutes as bottoms brown quickly.
7. Remove from oven and cool before serving.
